description: The debate regarding whether the future of AI belongs to open-weights models (Meta's LLaMA) or strictly proprietary, API-gated models (OpenAI/Anthropic). This tracks the shift in the AI research community and enterprise developers.

key_events.description: Release of LLaMA-2 allows for commercial usage, disrupting the proprietary market.
OpenAI releases proprietary GPT-4-Turbo with massive performance lead.
Concerns over 'AI safety' lead to lobbying for stricter controls on open-weights model releases.

calibration_notes: Calibrates how safety concerns and performance gaps impact the open-vs-closed source battle.
